title: cirsium ferum
intro: Cirsium ferum, also known as the prairie thistle or cotton thistle, is a flowering plant native to the prairies of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium ferum include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues due to its saponin content. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in capsule form, to harness its potential health benefits.
